title: History DB grows without bound — no TTL, no max row count
description: history.db has no pruning mechanism. Every chat message is retained forever. A user running nie chat daily for a year will accumulate tens of thousands of rows. The log subcommand already has a --limit flag so users expect bounded display, but the DB itself grows. At scale, SQLite VACUUM stops helping and queries slow. Before Phase 2 (at-rest encryption) this should have a configurable MAX_HISTORY_ROWS with an on-open prune step (DELETE FROM messages WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM messages ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT ?)).
